# StagePilot

Purpose: tool-calling reliability gateway with regression tests, provider scorecards, and trace observability
Free entry point: free public benchmark/demo routes and sample traces
Paid boundary: paid hosted regression workspace, private benchmark scenarios, and provider routing dashboard
Canonical URL: https://stage-pilot.pages.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/stage-pilot
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/stage-pilot/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/stage-pilot/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: https://github.com/KIM3310/stage-pilot/issues/new?template=service-inquiry.yml&title=Private+workspace+inquiry%3A+StagePilot

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for StagePilot demo, StagePilot system architecture, StagePilot developer tool, tool-calling reliability gateway with regression tests, provider scorecards, and trace observability service.
